calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Petitioners: CHIEN LY AND THUY AN HO, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: JEREMY THACH HO, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name fo the Minor to: JEREMY THACH LY.
Decree signed in open court.
